series_metadata.series_description: An index of the case number, docket number, permit holder statistics, permit type and number, a synopsis of the charge for each case brought before the LCC, and a chronological record of the case.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final dispositionof all legal actions and appeals of all cases listed in the Docket, whichever occurs last, and then destroy. State Archives to review material prior to disposition, Paper: Wastepaper
